$comment: MailAegis update & announcement channel. Edit this file, commit it, push it — every running copy of MailAegis picks it up within a few hours. See channel/README.md for the field reference.

latest.notes: Fixes subjects in any language but English being read with a stray space.
changelog: Non-English subjects are decoded correctly. Long headers are split by the sender's mail client, and MailAegis was leaving a space at the break — so "Confirmación de la transferencia" was read as "Confirmación de la  transferencia", and every rule matching on the subject missed. Worth updating if you handle mail in any language but English.
Malformed API requests now answer 400 instead of 500.
Auto-refresh works in the "All mailboxes" view, which previously never updated.
1.3.0 also brought: sender allow/block lists, an audit trail and SIEM webhook, undo send, the raw source viewer and defanged IOC export.

announcements.title: MailAegis is open source — and free forever.
announcements.body: If it saves your team from one wire-transfer fraud, a star on GitHub is all we ask.
